name: Prediction Market Signal Aggregator
description: Cross-platform prediction market odds + proxy-backed social sentiment with arbitrage/divergence signals.
longDescription: Aggregates Polymarket, Kalshi, and Metaculus data, then combines proxy-backed social sentiment to detect pricing divergence and potential arbitrage opportunities. Designed for AI agents that need reliable, structured market signal data with x402 micropayments.

pricing.comparison: Traditional alternatives are either expensive subscriptions or fragmented tools. This service provides normalized cross-market + sentiment signal output with no subscription friction via x402.

whyMobileProxy: Social sentiment scraping (e.g., Reddit and similar anti-bot protected sources) is more reliable via mobile carrier IPs. This improves signal freshness and reduces block/challenge rates compared with datacenter-only scraping.
limitations: v1 sentiment source is Reddit-first while X/TikTok are planned follow-ons
Signal confidence is heuristic in v1 and should be interpreted as directional
Metaculus integration may vary depending on upstream API response shape
